case_title: LEWIS, BRANT et al VS KUNG, CECIL

docket_entries.description: UNTIMELY POS; DEFT CECIL KUNG WAS GIVEN LESS THAN 25 DAYS NOTICE FOR SUBSTITUTED SERVICE OUT OF S.F. COUNTY.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KUNG, CECIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY LEWIS, BRANT HURLEY, SEAN AS TO DEFENDANT KUNG, CECIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEWIS, BRANT HURLEY, SEAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUNG, CECIL $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $665.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KUNG, CECIL
